caption: The video features a man performing a musical piece, likely a song, in front of an audience. He is wearing glasses and traditional attire, including a white shirt with a distinctive red and black design on the chest and a black vest adorned with blue beadwork. The man is holding a guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is both playing and vocalizing. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance. The audience is partially visible, with some heads in the foreground, indicating their engagement with the performance.
